items.content_html: Obsidian Asana Mirror is a plugin for Obsidian that syncs your Asana tasks with an Obsidian note. The plugin allows you to manually or periodically sync tasks, providing a seamless way to keep your task list up to date.
items.title: bookchiq/obsidian-asana-mirror: Obsidian Asana Mirror is a plugin for Obsidian that syncs your Asana tasks with an Obsidian note. The plugin allows you to manually or periodically sync tasks, providing a seamless way to keep your task list up to date.

items.content_html: ML Vault 📘: A collaborative Obsidian vault for sharing and exploring AI and ML knowledge. Join us as we build, discuss, and contribute to a rich resource of notes, tutorials, and insights 🚀. Perfect for both beginners and experts 🧠. Features integration with Git 🔄, Zotero 📚, and Templater 🛠 plugins.
items.title: AlexandreManai/ml_vault: ML Vault 📘: A collaborative Obsidian vault for sharing and exploring AI and ML knowledge. Join us as we build, discuss, and contribute to a rich resource of notes, tutorials, and insights 🚀. Perfect for both beginners and experts 🧠. Features integration with Git 🔄, Zotero 📚, and Templater 🛠 plugins.
